title: The Lord in Your Distress Attend

verses.text: The Lord in your distress attend; May Jacob’s God protect you well, And from his holy place send help and strengthen you from Zion’s hill. Trinity Psalter, 2000, alt.
May he regard your sacrifice, And all your off’rings bear in mind; O may he grant your heart’s desire, Fulfilling all that you designed. Trinity Psalter, 2000, alt.
May we in your salvation joy, Our banners raise in God’s great name. O may the Lord fulfill your pray’rs and grant you all you ask of him Trinity Psalter, 2000, alt.
In chariots some have confidence, And some in horses take their pride, But we boast only one defense: The name of God, the Lord Most High. Trinity Psalter, 2000, alt.
